    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    A

    AbstractSymmetry - Class in sudoku.generation.symmetry
    Represents the traditional symmetric pattern of the Sudoku puzzle to be generated.
    AbstractSymmetry(int) - Constructor for class sudoku.generation.symmetry.AbstractSymmetry
    Creates a symmetry strategy for a grid of the given size.
    App - Class in sudoku.cli
    Entry point for the Sudoku command-line interface.

    C

    checkBounds(int, int) - Method in class sudoku.generation.symmetry.AbstractSymmetry
    Verifies that the given (row, col) coordinate falls within the sudoku grid.
    checkForDuplicates(int, int) - Method in interface sudoku.ISudokuGrid
    Checks whether duplicates of the given cell value exist within the ISudokuState which contains it.
    checkForDuplicates(int, int) - Method in class sudoku.SudokuGrid
     
    clearCell(int, int) - Method in interface sudoku.cli.IController
    Clears the target cell of the value which it currently stores.
    clone() - Method in interface sudoku.ISudokuGrid
     
    clone() - Method in class sudoku.SudokuGrid
     
    ControllerException - Exception Class in sudoku.cli.exceptions
    Base type for checked exceptions thrown by sudoku.cli.IController operations, representing recoverable error conditions that arise from invalid user actions.
    ControllerException(String) - Constructor for exception class sudoku.cli.exceptions.ControllerException
    Constructs a new ControllerException with the given detail message.
    countSolutions() - Method in interface sudoku.ISudokuSolver
    Calculates the number of solutions that a sudoku puzzle currently has.
    countSolutions() - Method in class sudoku.SudokuSolver
     

    D

    DEFAULT_SIZE - Static variable in interface sudoku.ISudokuGrid
     
    DihedralSymmetry - Class in sudoku.generation.symmetry
    The puzzle is to be symmetric both rotationally and reflectionally.
    DihedralSymmetry(int) - Constructor for class sudoku.generation.symmetry.DihedralSymmetry
    Creates a dihedral (rotational and reflectional) symmetry strategy for a grid of the given size.

    E

    EASY - Enum constant in enum class sudoku.generation.ISudokuGenerator.PuzzleDifficulty
    Around half of all cells are removed, yielding 30-40 givens.
    EmptyCellException - Exception Class in sudoku.cli.exceptions
    Thrown when an operation attempts to clear a cell that is already empty.
    EmptyCellException(int, int) - Constructor for exception class sudoku.cli.exceptions.EmptyCellException
    Constructs a new EmptyCellException for the given cell.
    EmptyGridException - Exception Class in sudoku.cli.exceptions
    Thrown when an operation requires a non-empty grid, but the Sudoku grid is already empty.
    EmptyGridException() - Constructor for exception class sudoku.cli.exceptions.EmptyGridException
    Constructs a new EmptyGridException.
    equals(Object) - Method in class sudoku.SudokuGrid
     
    equals(Object) - Method in record class sudoku.Tuple2
    Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.

    F

    first() - Method in record class sudoku.Tuple2
    Returns the value of the first record component.

    G

    generatePuzzle(boolean) - Method in interface sudoku.generation.ISudokuGenerator
    Generates the initial grid for a random 9x9 Sudoku puzzle.
    generatePuzzle(boolean) - Method in class sudoku.generation.SudokuGenerator
     
    getGridDimensions() - Method in interface sudoku.ISudokuGrid
    Gets the size of the grid in terms of the number of cells it contains.
    getGridDimensions() - Method in class sudoku.SudokuGrid
     
    getGridState() - Method in interface sudoku.cli.IController
    Returns the current state of the Sudoku grid.
    getSize() - Method in interface sudoku.ISudokuGrid
    Gets the size of the grid.
    getSize() - Method in class sudoku.SudokuGrid
     
    getSymmetricCells(int, int) - Method in class sudoku.generation.symmetry.AbstractSymmetry
    Gets the list of cells that should be removed based on the symmetry pattern.
    getSymmetricCells(int, int) - Method in class sudoku.generation.symmetry.DihedralSymmetry
     
    getSymmetricCells(int, int) - Method in class sudoku.generation.symmetry.NoSymmetry
     
    getSymmetricCells(int, int) - Method in class sudoku.generation.symmetry.ReflectionalSymmetry
     
    getSymmetricCells(int, int) - Method in class sudoku.generation.symmetry.RotationalSymmetry
     
    getValue(int, int) - Method in interface sudoku.ISudokuGrid
    Gets the current value of a cell in a sudoku grid.
    getValue(int, int) - Method in class sudoku.SudokuGrid
     
    GivenCellException - Exception Class in sudoku.cli.exceptions
    Thrown when an operation attempts to modify a cell that stores a given/hinted value.
    GivenCellException(int, int) - Constructor for exception class sudoku.cli.exceptions.GivenCellException
    Constructs a new GivenCellException for the given cell.
    GridSolvedException - Exception Class in sudoku.cli.exceptions
    Thrown when an operation requires unsolved cells, but the Sudoku grid has already been solved.
    GridSolvedException() - Constructor for exception class sudoku.cli.exceptions.GridSolvedException
    Constructs a new GridSolvedException.

    H

    HARD - Enum constant in enum class sudoku.generation.ISudokuGenerator.PuzzleDifficulty
    The maximum number of cells will be removed from the puzzle.
    hashCode() - Method in class sudoku.SudokuGrid
     
    hashCode() - Method in record class sudoku.Tuple2
    Returns a hash code value for this object.
    hasUniqueSolution() - Method in interface sudoku.ISudokuSolver
    Determines whether or not the sudoku puzzle has exactly one valid solution.
    hasUniqueSolution() - Method in class sudoku.SudokuSolver
     
    hint() - Method in interface sudoku.cli.IController
    Generates a new given cell in a random place on the Sudoku grid.

    I

    IController - Interface in sudoku.cli
    Outlines the controller layer of the game, which wraps the sudoku package, facilitating all communication between the model and view layers of the MVC stack of the game.
    InvalidCellException - Exception Class in sudoku.cli.exceptions
    Thrown when a requested cell coordinate does not exist within the bounds of the Sudoku grid.
    InvalidCellException(int, int) - Constructor for exception class sudoku.cli.exceptions.InvalidCellException
    Constructs a new InvalidCellException for the given out-of-bounds cell.
    InvalidValueException - Exception Class in sudoku.cli.exceptions
    Thrown when a requested value to place in a cell exceeds the size of the Sudoku grid.
    InvalidValueException(int, int) - Constructor for exception class sudoku.cli.exceptions.InvalidValueException
    Constructs a new InvalidValueException for the given out-of-range value.
    isGridStateValid(ISudokuState) - Static method in interface sudoku.ISudokuSolver
    Checks to ensure the state of the grid provided is legal in terms of the Sudoku game rules.
    isPlacementValid(ISudokuState, int, int, int) - Static method in interface sudoku.ISudokuSolver
    Check whether a move is legal in a given grid state.
    isSolvable() - Method in interface sudoku.ISudokuSolver
    Uses backtracking to compute whether or not the grid in its current state is solvable.
    isSolvable() - Method in class sudoku.SudokuSolver
     
    isSolved() - Method in interface sudoku.ISudokuGrid
    Determines whether or not the sudoku grid has yet been solved.
    isSolved() - Method in class sudoku.SudokuGrid
     
    ISudokuGenerator - Interface in sudoku.generation
    Generates 9x9 Sudoku puzzles at a given difficulty and cell-removal symmetry.
    ISudokuGenerator.PuzzleDifficulty - Enum Class in sudoku.generation
    Represents the difficulty level of the generated Sudoku puzzle.
    ISudokuGrid - Interface in sudoku
    Represents a Sudoku grid, providing higher-level operations on top of the basic ISudokuState cell access.
    ISudokuSolver - Interface in sudoku
    Provides operations for solving a Sudoku grid and for validating cell placements and grid states.
    isValid() - Method in interface sudoku.ISudokuGrid
    Determines whether or not the current state of the sudoku grid is a valid solution so far.
    isValid() - Method in class sudoku.SudokuGrid
     
    isValidMove(int, int, int) - Method in interface sudoku.ISudokuSolver
    Checks whether setting a given cell to a certain value would follow the rules of Sudoku.
    isValidMove(int, int, int) - Method in class sudoku.SudokuSolver
     

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class sudoku.cli.App
    Launches the Sudoku CLI.
    MEDIUM - Enum constant in enum class sudoku.generation.ISudokuGenerator.PuzzleDifficulty
    Around 50-60 cells are to be removed, yielding 20-30 givens.

    N

    newGame(ISudokuGenerator.PuzzleDifficulty) - Method in interface sudoku.cli.IController
    Generates a new sudoku grid, starting with the given difficulty.
    NoSymmetry - Class in sudoku.generation.symmetry
    There is to be no enforced symmetry in the puzzle.
    NoSymmetry(int) - Constructor for class sudoku.generation.symmetry.NoSymmetry
    Creates a no-symmetry strategy for a grid of the given size.

    P

    placeValue(int, int, int) - Method in interface sudoku.cli.IController
    Attempts to place a given value in the target cell.

    R

    RANDOM - Enum constant in enum class sudoku.generation.ISudokuGenerator.PuzzleDifficulty
    The number of cells to be removed is completely random.
    ReflectionalSymmetry - Class in sudoku.generation.symmetry
    The givens are mirrored vertically, creating identical left-to-right halves.
    ReflectionalSymmetry(int) - Constructor for class sudoku.generation.symmetry.ReflectionalSymmetry
    Creates a reflectional symmetry strategy for a grid of the given size.
    reset() - Method in interface sudoku.cli.IController
    Resets the grid to an empty state.
    resetGrid() - Method in interface sudoku.ISudokuGrid
    Empties the sudoku grid of values.
    resetGrid() - Method in class sudoku.SudokuGrid
     
    RotationalSymmetry - Class in sudoku.generation.symmetry
    Two-fold (180 degree) rotation: the grid looks the same if you turn it completely upside down.
    RotationalSymmetry(int) - Constructor for class sudoku.generation.symmetry.RotationalSymmetry
    Creates a rotational symmetry strategy for a grid of the given size.

    S

    second() - Method in record class sudoku.Tuple2
    Returns the value of the second record component.
    setValue(int, int, int) - Method in interface sudoku.ISudokuGrid
    Sets the value of a cell in a sudoku grid.
    setValue(int, int, int) - Method in class sudoku.SudokuGrid
     
    size - Variable in class sudoku.generation.symmetry.AbstractSymmetry
     
    solve() - Method in interface sudoku.cli.IController
    Completes the grid by filling in any blank cells, and replacing any that are incorrect.
    solveGrid() - Method in interface sudoku.ISudokuSolver
    Computes a set of solutions for the sudoku grid in its current state.
    solveGrid() - Method in class sudoku.SudokuSolver
     
    solveGrid(int) - Method in interface sudoku.ISudokuSolver
    Computes a set of solutions for the sudoku grid in its current state.
    solveGrid(int) - Method in class sudoku.SudokuSolver
     
    sudoku - package sudoku
     
    sudoku.cli - package sudoku.cli
     
    sudoku.cli.exceptions - package sudoku.cli.exceptions
     
    sudoku.generation - package sudoku.generation
     
    sudoku.generation.symmetry - package sudoku.generation.symmetry
     
    SudokuGenerator - Class in sudoku.generation
    Generates 9x9 Sudoku puzzles by producing a full valid grid and then removing cells according to a target ISudokuGenerator.PuzzleDifficulty and AbstractSymmetry pattern.
    SudokuGenerator(ISudokuGenerator.PuzzleDifficulty, AbstractSymmetry) - Constructor for class sudoku.generation.SudokuGenerator
    Initialises a SudokuGenerator with the given target difficulty.
    SudokuGrid - Class in sudoku
    Public-facing representation of a Sudoku grid.
    SudokuGrid() - Constructor for class sudoku.SudokuGrid
    Initialises an empty 9x9 sudoku grid.
    SudokuGrid(int) - Constructor for class sudoku.SudokuGrid
    Initialises an empty sudoku grid with the given size.
    SudokuSolver - Class in sudoku
    Solves a Sudoku grid using recursive backtracking.
    SudokuSolver(ISudokuGrid) - Constructor for class sudoku.SudokuSolver
    Creates a solver which operates on the given grid.

    T

    toString() - Method in class sudoku.SudokuGrid
     
    toString() - Method in record class sudoku.Tuple2
    Returns a string representation of this record class.
    Tuple2<T,U> - Record Class in sudoku
    Represents a tuple of two elements.
    Tuple2(T, U) - Constructor for record class sudoku.Tuple2
    Creates an instance of a Tuple2 record class.

    V

    validateGridSize(int) - Static method in interface sudoku.ISudokuGrid
    Validates the size of a sudoku grid.
    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class sudoku.generation.ISudokuGenerator.PuzzleDifficulty
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    values() - Static method in enum class sudoku.generation.ISudokuGenerator.PuzzleDifficulty
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
    VERY_EASY - Enum constant in enum class sudoku.generation.ISudokuGenerator.PuzzleDifficulty
    Up to half of all cells are removed, yielding 70-40 givens.
